question: List the names of orchestras that have no performance.
gold_sql: SELECT Orchestra FROM orchestra WHERE Orchestra_ID NOT IN (SELECT Orchestra_ID FROM performance)
predicted_sql: SELECT col_2 FROM table_2 WHERE col_1 NOT IN (SELECT col_2 FROM table_3)
raw_response: SELECT col_2 FROM table_2 WHERE col_1 NOT IN (SELECT col_2 FROM table_3)
